title: Pack of 40 Assorted Coloured Neon Fluorescent Stars 100 x 100mm - Price Signs, Star Shape Signs Price Eye-catching, Retail Store Price Label Garage Sale Supplies Tags for Party and Decoration
features: Pack of 40 Assorted Coloured Neon Fluorescent Stars 100 x 100mm.
Bring energy and colour to any space with this pack of 40 Neon Stars, each star measures 100 x 100mm and is made from bold, high-visibility neon card in assorted colours.
Ideal for classrooms, displays, posters, sales signage, parties, or craft projects, these stars are perfect for grabbing attention and adding a vibrant touch wherever they are used.
description: Product Description Assorted Neon Fluorescent Stars for Displays and Labelling These assorted neon fluorescent stars are produced in a selection of bright colours. Made from card with a vivid surface, they are designed to attract attention on displays, signs, or notices. The stars are supplied pre-cut and ready to use. Suitable for a variety of applications, these shapes help highlight information or create visual impact across multiple settings. Bright Neon Colours for High Visibility Each star is produced in assorted fluorescent colours. The vivid surface is intended to stand out when used on posters, displays, or general labelling. The colours support visibility in a wide range of environments. Made from Card with Pre-Cut Shape The stars are made from card material and supplied in a pre-cut shape. They are ready to use for display or labelling. The surface is suitable for writing with pens or markers if additional information is required. Suitable for Visual Displays and Promotions These neon stars can be used to enhance the visual appearance of signs, labels, and notices. Their shape and colour allow key messages to be highlighted effectively. The format is compatible with various display surfaces.
